purpose: Classify new rekordbox tracks by the user's set dramaturgy and local library taste, not just Beatport genre.

colors.Orange: Main Time / Indie Dance / club Breaks / Future House

taste_profile: Local database taste is the primary authority. Web genres and Beatport metadata are supporting evidence only.
Do not map rare colors broadly. Orange is now accepted for a subset of Indie Dance, but it usually remains rating 3 / JOURNEY rather than automatic MAIN.
Progressive House is usually a journey lane. Prefer Purple for atmospheric/driving journey material; use Blue mostly for clearly deep/emotional warm material.
Melodic House & Techno is not automatically peak. Ben Böhmer-style melodic remixes and deep melodic material can be WARM/JOURNEY with Aqua/Blue/Purple rather than Red.
Breaks around 122 BPM often belongs to Aqua, rating 2, warm/open/journey. Do not make low-BPM breaks Orange MAIN by default.
Organic House can become Organic / Downtempo, Electronica, or Progressive depending on the track. Do not force all organic material to OPEN rating 1.
House and Tech House should stay House/Tech House unless there is strong evidence for a more specific club lane. Do not fall back to Dance / Pop just because iTunes says Pop.

Indie Dance is no longer mostly Green by default. Instrumental atmospheric Indie Dance may be Orange/JOURNEY; dark/acid/bass/techno-leaning Indie Dance may be Red; broken/acid/breaks-leaning Indie Dance may be Aqua/Blue.
Drum & Bass is not automatic Red/PEAK in this library. Vocal/emotional DnB can be Pink/MAIN TIME, deep/atmospheric DnB can be Aqua/WARM or JOURNEY, and dark/driving DnB may be Purple/MAIN TIME.
Fast Breaks around 130-132 BPM can be Orange when acid/driving/hypnotic, but vocal/atmospheric Breaks may be Blue/JOURNEY and deep Breaks may be Aqua/WARM.
Progressive House uses Purple for dark/driving/hypnotic journey or peak material; Blue is mostly deep/warm, Green can appear for hypnotic/organic-leaning journey tracks.
Melodic Techno splits by function: Drumcode/Massano/dark/driving material can be Red/PEAK, while Marsh/PIAS/vocal/deep melodic material can be Blue or Aqua and rating 2-3.
House and Deep House can be Yellow when they read as classic, piano, vocal, or main-time club material.
Techno peak-time material with Acid/Dark/Driving/Hypnotic tags often sits Red/MAIN TIME at rating 3-4; not every such track needs rating 5.
Psy-Trance and Trance are not one color. Psy can be Orange MAIN TIME, Purple Journey/Peak, or Red only when it is truly peak-time. Vocal/emotional Trance can be Blue even when MAIN TIME.
Organic/Afro material with female vocal and peak/journey tension can become Orange/PEAK instead of Green.
Downtempo and beatless/chillout mixes should be OPEN / INTRO even when BPM metadata is misleading.
Classic vocal club remixes may be Yellow or Red and tagged as Techno/House/Classic depending on energy; treat them as special cases for review.
Priority A/B/C is not stable yet. Do not require priority tags during learning batches.

library_calibration.reason: In this library Boris Brejcha / FCKNG SERIOUS sits with similar melodic techno tracks, not automatic red peak.
Ben Böhmer-style melodic remixes in this library lean deep/journey/warm, not automatic peak.

manual_examples.track: Chris Lake, The Chemical Brothers - Galvanize (Chris Lake Extended Mix)
manual_examples.lesson: Classic vocal club remix: user preferred rating 4, Yellow, Techno, MAIN TIME, Driving/Vocal/Emotional over Dance / Pop journey.

manual_examples.track: Audiojack, Kevin Knapp - This Frequency
manual_examples.lesson: House on Crosstown Rebels should remain House; vocal/driving/deep, Yellow, rating 3, PEAK in user's current tagging.

manual_examples.track: Durante, Ezequiel Arias - Logical
manual_examples.lesson: Anjunadeep progressive can be much more energetic than WARM; user marked rating 4, Purple, PEAK, Atmospheric/Driving.

manual_examples.track: Marc Romboy, Stephan Bodzin - Callisto (Ben Böhmer Remix)
manual_examples.lesson: Melodic House & Techno is not automatic peak. User marked rating 2, Aqua, warm/deep/instrumental journey.

manual_examples.track: JØRD, Dansyn - The Future
manual_examples.lesson: Indie Dance metadata can actually be Bass House/Techno/Melodic Techno energy; user marked Red, PEAK, Dark/Driving/Hypnotic, rating 3.

manual_examples.track: Tigerblind - Go All Out
manual_examples.lesson: Indie Dance can be Yellow/JOURNEY when it reads as a special/classic-feeling instrumental rather than Green organic material.

manual_examples.track: Time Modem - Werkzeuge Eines Fernen Willens (Adana Twins 2021 Edit)
manual_examples.lesson: Atmospheric instrumental Indie Dance can be Orange while staying rating 3 / JOURNEY.

manual_examples.track: Trikk, Jimi Jules - Absolute Body Control
manual_examples.lesson: Fast 133 BPM Innervisions-style Indie Dance can become rating 4 / Red / MAIN TIME / Driving.

manual_examples.track: Yuzza - Pray (Rami Chami Remix)
manual_examples.lesson: Acid/breaks-leaning Indie Dance may be Blue/Aqua with Breaks/Acid tags instead of Orange.

manual_examples.track: Avoure, Chris Orell - Chasing Voices
manual_examples.lesson: 122 BPM Breaks should be Aqua/rating 2/open-warm, not Orange MAIN.

manual_examples.track: Perfect Kombo - Revo
manual_examples.lesson: 132 BPM acid/driving/hypnotic Breaks can be Orange, rating 4, MAIN TIME.

manual_examples.track: Dylan Dylan - Do You Need Me?
manual_examples.lesson: 129 BPM vocal/atmospheric Breaks can be Blue, rating 3, JOURNEY rather than Orange.

manual_examples.track: Marsh - Mercy
manual_examples.lesson: Anjunadeep melodic material with deep/emotional/atmospheric tags can be Aqua, rating 2, WARM UP.

manual_examples.track: Adam Beyer, Bart Skils, Massano, Doriann - Your Mind (Massano & Doriann Remix)
manual_examples.lesson: Drumcode/Massano melodic techno can be Red/PEAK even at rating 3 when Dark/Driving/Female Vocal.

manual_examples.track: Karen Harding, Dimension - Guardian Angel
manual_examples.lesson: Vocal/emotional Drum & Bass can be Pink, rating 3, MAIN TIME.

manual_examples.track: Rafau Etamski - So Sweet
manual_examples.lesson: Deep/atmospheric/vocal Drum & Bass can be Aqua, rating 2, WARM UP.

manual_examples.track: Trilucid - See Through You (Tim Cullen Extended Instrumental Remix)
manual_examples.lesson: House with piano/female vocal/driving main-time feeling can be Yellow, rating 3, MAIN TIME.

manual_examples.track: Kasper Koman - Biome (Mike Rish Remix)
manual_examples.lesson: Dark/hypnotic progressive can be Purple, rating 4, with Techno/Peak flavor without becoming Red.

manual_examples.track: Laidback Luke, Jonathan Mendelsohn - Till Tonight (Ferry Corsten Fix)
manual_examples.lesson: Vocal Trance at 130 BPM can be Red, rating 3, MAIN TIME when it is driving and female-vocal-led.

manual_examples.track: Aly & Fila, Jwaydan - We Control The Sunlight
manual_examples.lesson: Emotional/female vocal Trance can be Blue, rating 4, MAIN TIME rather than automatic Red.

manual_examples.track: Reborn, Zyce - Colors & Patterns
manual_examples.lesson: Psy-Trance with acid/dark/driving/hypnotic journey tags can be Orange, rating 3, MAIN TIME.

manual_examples.track: Astral Projection - Let There Be Light
manual_examples.lesson: Classic-feeling Psy-Trance can be Purple, rating 4, Journey/Acid/Dark/Hypnotic instead of Red.

manual_examples.track: Teenage Mutants, Kos:mo - Caught Up
manual_examples.lesson: Peak-time Techno can be Red MAIN TIME at rating 3 when Acid/Dark/Driving/Vocal.

manual_examples.track: Tinlicker, Hero Baldwin - God In You
manual_examples.lesson: PIAS melodic/vocal material can be Blue, rating 3, PEAK/Trance/Melodic Techno when emotional and female-vocal-led.

manual_examples.track: Miss Monique, Glowal - Lost On A Dancefloor
manual_examples.lesson: Siona melodic/indie material with Acid/Dark/Driving/Vocal can be Orange MAIN TIME/PEAK, not necessarily Red.

manual_examples.track: CamelPhat, Josh Gigante, Kuuda - So Good (Kuuda Chillout Mix)
manual_examples.lesson: Chillout/downtempo mixes can be Green, rating 1, OPEN / INTRO with Electronica/Organic Downtempo tags despite misleading BPM.

manual_examples.track: Eleonora, Ilias Katelanos, Plecta - Lose Control
manual_examples.lesson: Organic/Afro female-vocal hypnotic journey material can be Orange and PEAK.

manual_examples.track: High One - Waraome
manual_examples.lesson: Dark/acid/hypnotic Drum & Bass peak material can be Orange, rating 3, PEAK.
